saasi 1.0.0
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

add_tip_states()
Add tip states to a phylogenetic tree
check_tree_compatibility()
Check if phylogenetic tree is compatible with saasi
demo_metadata
SAASI demonstration: tree metadata
demo_pars
SAASI demonstration: birth-death-sampling process parameters
demo_Q
SAASI demonstration: transition rate matrix
demo_tree
SAASI demonstration: timed phylogenetic tree
demo_tree_prepared
SAASI demonstration: pre-prepared tree
drop_tips_by_state()
Drop tips from a phylogenetic tree by their state values
estimate_bds_parameters()
Estimate rate parameters of a birth-death-sampling process
estimate_transition_rates()
Estimate the transition rate matrix of the discrete trait process
plot_saasi()
Plot a phylogenetic tree with SAASI tip annotations
prepare_tree_for_saasi()
Reformat a phylogenetic tree to be compatible with saasi
saasi()
Sampling-Aware Ancestral State Inference
sim_bds_tree()
Simulate a phylogenetic tree from a birth-death-sampling process

Developed by Ivan Gill, Yexuan Song, Renny Doig.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
